name: busca-plus-workspace
description: Orquestracao local de desenvolvimento do Busca+

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n crawler,search -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix ../busca-plus-crawler" "npm run dev --prefix ../busca-plus-search"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n crawler,search,worker -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix ../busca-plus-crawler" "npm run dev --prefix ../busca-plus-search" "npm run worker --prefix ../busca-plus-crawler"
